title: Greptile .greptile/config.json
$comment: Upstream census: https://www.greptile.com/docs/code-review/greptile-config-reference — Greptile publishes no official schema (no SchemaStore entry); this file mirrors that reference and is corrected against it on drift.

collapsible.description: Whether the section can be collapsed

strictness.description: Comment threshold. 1 = verbose (flags more issues), 3 = critical only. Default 2.

commentTypes.description: Comment categories to include. Default: all four.

fileChangeLimit.description: Maximum number of changed files to review

labels.description: Only review PRs with these labels (globs)

disabledLabels.description: Skip review for PRs with these labels (globs)

includeAuthors.description: Only review PRs from these authors (globs)

excludeAuthors.description: Skip review for PRs from these authors (globs)

includeBranches.description: Only review PRs targeting these branches (globs)

excludeBranches.description: Skip review for PRs targeting these branches (globs)

includeKeywords.description: Newline-separated keywords; only review PRs with these in title/description

ignoreKeywords.description: Newline-separated keywords; skip PRs with these in title/description

ignorePatterns.description: Newline-separated file patterns to skip (.gitignore syntax)

triggerOnUpdates.description: Re-run the review when the PR is updated. Default false.

statusCheck.description: Post a GitHub status check instead of the files-reviewed status comment. Default false.

statusCommentsEnabled.description: Post the main review summary comment on PRs; distinct from the files-reviewed status message

skipReview.description: Skip auto-review entirely for files in this directory; manual triggers still work

shouldUpdateDescription.description: Update PR description instead of posting a review comment

updateSummaryOnly.description: Only update the summary; no individual inline comments

updateExistingSummaryComment.description: Update the existing summary comment in place on re-review instead of posting a new one; honored by the bot, absent from the current reference census

fixWithAI.description: Add AI fix prompts to suggested fixes

hideFooter.description: Hide the Greptile footer from review comments

summarySection.description: PR summary at the top of the review

sequenceDiagramSection.description: Diagram of the changes (sequence, ER, class, or flow)

repos.description: Related owner/repo entries Greptile reads during reviews; same SCM as this repo, subgroup segments admitted

instructions.description: Free-form reviewer instructions; cascading configs concatenate

rule.description: The rule instruction shown to the reviewer

id.description: Stable identifier; required if a child config disables this rule via disabledRules

scope.description: Glob patterns relative to the .greptile/ directory; avoid ../

disabledRules.description: IDs of inherited rules that do not apply in this directory
